workflow_name: View Table Spaces for a Database and Display Table Space Status via DB2 System Catalog

steps.description: Type option 1 to select DB2 system catalog on the DB2 Admin main menu
Press Enter to navigate to the System Catalog Objects screen
Type option D to select Databases on the System Catalog Objects screen
Type a database name or name pattern in the Schema filter field to narrow the Databases list
Press Enter to submit the filter and display the matching Databases list
Type line command S in the Select field next to the target database to view its table spaces
Press Enter to navigate to the Table Spaces list for the selected database
Type line command DIS in the Select field next to the target table space to display its status
Press Enter to display the DB2 command output showing the table space status
Press PF3 to return to the Table Spaces list
